name: Kixie Sales Dialer API
what_it_does: AI-powered sales engagement platform and dialer with REST API — providing one-click calling from CRM, power and multi-line parallel dialing, SMS automation, local presence dialing, call coaching with AI transcription, and deep CRM integration for inside sales teams.
use_cases: Managing Kixie contact lists and dialing campaigns via REST API
Querying call activity and disposition data for CRM logging automation
Pulling call recordings and AI transcripts for sales coaching analytics
Integrating Kixie call events with HubSpot or Salesforce via webhook
Automating SMS sequence enrollment based on CRM deal stage changes
not_for: Inbound customer support contact center routing
High-volume predictive dialing at call center scale (use Five9 or Genesys)
Standalone VoIP business phone without CRM integration
best_when: A B2B inside sales team primarily using HubSpot or Salesforce wants AI-powered dialing with local presence, SMS automation, and deep CRM native integration with minimal setup.
avoid_when: You need enterprise contact center with WFM, high-volume predictive dialing at scale, or you don't use HubSpot/Salesforce as your CRM.

auth.notes: API key from Kixie account. Passed in request headers or query parameters depending on endpoint. Business line ID required for many operations. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. Webhook for call events and SMS events. CRM native integration uses separate token exchange.

pricing.notes: Los Angeles-based company. Founded 2013. Multi-line power dialer (dial 10 numbers simultaneously with PowerCall). Local presence dialing in 700+ area codes. HubSpot and Salesforce native apps in their marketplaces. AI coaching with real-time transcription. Strong in SMB and mid-market inside sales.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for calls, contacts, SMS, and reporting. API key header auth. Moderate documentation — primarily integration-focused. Business line ID required for call operations. CRM integration via native HubSpot/Salesforce apps is primary use case. Webhook for call/SMS events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Call reads idempotent. Contact reads idempotent by phone number. SMS reads idempotent by ID. Campaign management idempotent by ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Business line ID required for most call operations — different from account ID
Local presence dialing requires purchasing local numbers in target area codes
Multi-line PowerCall requires specific plan tier
AI transcription processing is async — webhook or polling required
TCPA compliance for power dialing — implement consent management for US calling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and HIPAA compliant. US data residency. API key auth. TCPA compliance required for outbound calling — implement consent verification before dialing. Call recordings contain PII — secure storage and access controls required.
